summary: Electrifying 4‑13‑84 Hampton performance with a standout, fire‑filled "Fire", but the recording source and quality are not described.
review: The reviewer places this show in their top five, praising an unforgettable “Fire” that had the band and audience buzzing, especially noting Mickey’s talking drum and Phil’s responsive energy. No comments were made about the audio fidelity, so the technical side remains unknown. Overall the performance is viewed very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review (4 stars) focusing on the musical performance; no information on recording quality, so rating leans on show strength.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as being in a good mood overall with high energy, especially during the climactic ending of "Fire".

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer notes Phil seemed to pick up on Mickey's drum energy.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey’s talking‑drum work is highlighted as a major source of stage energy.
